word: G2743 - καυτηριάζω - kautēriázō - kow-tay-ree-ad'-zo - Sear with a hot iron

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Sear with a hot iron
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to mark by branding, to brand
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a derivative of G2545; to brand (“cauterize”), that is, (by implication) to render unsensitive (figuratively): - sear with a hot iron.
